events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, Memorial Day weekend through Labor Day weekend
events.venue: Cayucos Vet's Hall Parking Lot, corner of D St & Ocean Ave
events.summary: Weekly outdoor market with local produce, plants, flowers & artisan goods. Runs Fridays through Labor Day weekend.

events.title: Schooners Beachside Live Summer Concert Series
events.window: Every Saturday & Sunday afternoon/evening through Labor Day weekend
events.summary: Free beachfront live music with rotating local & touring bands every Sat & Sun all summer long at the iconic Cayucos pier-side restaurant.

events.title: Old Cayucos Tavern Weekend Live Music
events.window: Every Friday & Saturday night at 8pm, year-round
events.venue: Old Cayucos Tavern, 130 N Ocean Ave, Cayucos
events.summary: Live bands (rockabilly, blues, roots, rock & more) every Fri & Sat at 8pm in this historic 1906 tavern. 21+ only.

events.title: Schooners Open Mic Night
events.summary: Weekly open mic at this beachfront restaurant/bar. Any level welcome; sign up on the night.

events.title: 4th of July Weekend Peddler's Faire
events.venue: Cayucos Creek Lot (between Hardie Park and Ocean Ave)
events.summary: Weekend flea market & vendors fair with antiques, handmade goods, clothing & jewelry. Runs 9am–4pm over 4th of July weekend.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.summary: 56th annual beach run: 6-mile Fun Run finishes at Cayucos Pier; half marathon is an out-and-back. All ages, hard-packed sand course.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars fill downtown Cayucos for the 35th annual show, 8am–4pm. Live band, beer garden & Lions Club BBQ included.

events.title: Christmas in Cayucos
events.venue: Ocean Ave & D St, Downtown Cayucos
events.organizer: Cayucos Chamber of Commerce & Lioness Club
events.summary: Annual holiday open house with community tree lighting, carolers, Santa & Mrs. Claus, horse-carriage rides & merchant specials. Free.
